download.title: Download haex-vault
download.subtitle: Secure, encrypted storage for all your data. Available for desktop and mobile.

nightlyWarning.title: Experimental Build
nightlyWarning.description: Nightly builds are automated and may contain bugs or incomplete features. Use at your own risk.

installMethods.title: Install via package manager
installMethods.subtitle: Prefer the command line? Add our repository to your system's package manager and get updates automatically with your usual upgrade flow.

brew.title: macOS — Homebrew
brew.description: Tap our Homebrew cask. Works on both Apple Silicon and Intel.

apt.title: Debian / Ubuntu — APT
apt.description: Add the apt.haex.space repository. Supports amd64 and arm64.

dnf.title: Fedora / RHEL / Rocky / Alma — DNF/YUM
dnf.description: Add the rpm.haex.space repository. Supports x86_64 and aarch64.

zypper.title: openSUSE — Zypper
zypper.description: Add the rpm.haex.space repository to zypper.

pacman.title: Arch / Manjaro / EndeavourOS — Pacman
pacman.description: Add the arch.haex.space repository. Supports x86_64 and aarch64 (Arch Linux ARM).

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: Your data is encrypted locally before syncing. Only you have the keys.

sync.title: Seamless Sync
sync.description: Access your data from any device. Changes sync instantly across all platforms.

offline.title: Offline First
offline.description: Works without internet. Your data is always available, even offline.
